---
title: "Quartoing"
description: "The journey of procrastination and a young inspiration"
author:
  - name: Piyush Chaudhari
    url: https://pc-piyush.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0003-0970-5552
    #affiliation: Master of Environmental Data Science Program @ The Bren School (UCSB) & The National Center for Ecological Analysis & Synthesis
    #affiliation-url: https://ucsb-meds.github.io/ 
date: 10-16-2023
categories: [Quarto, R, Website] # self-defined categories
citation: 
  url: https://pc-piyush.github.io/posts/2023-10-19-Quartoing/ 
#image: preview_image.jpg
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
